Title: Auth/JWT test suite green
Acceptance Criteria: Register hashes password; duplicate email rejected; login returns JWT for valid and rejects invalid; protected endpoint rejects missing/invalid token; tests pass in CI

Title: Ownership guards + cross-user access tests
Acceptance Criteria: Accessing another user record returns 403 or 404; ownership tests pass for every user-owned API

Title: Wellness CRUD API tests (owned-only)
Acceptance Criteria: Create, list, update, delete tested; list and mutations restricted to owning user; tests pass

Title: Android wellness CRUD screens
Acceptance Criteria: List, add/edit form with validation, delete confirm; loading/empty/success/error states; CRUD works on device end-to-end

Title: Android auth polish (logout + expired-token redirect)
Acceptance Criteria: Logout clears stored token; expired/missing token returns user to login; verified on device

Title: Verify Python RAG indexing + retrieval
Acceptance Criteria: KB chunks with metadata; Chroma index builds; Ollama embeddings return; retrieval smoke test passes

Title: Docker smoke (mysql + spring persistence)
Acceptance Criteria: mysql + spring-backend start healthy; a created record persists across container restart

Title: Backend chat orchestration + tests
Acceptance Criteria: Validates non-empty question; calls AI service; saves message + sources; AI timeout returns controlled error

Title: Android chatbot screen + history
Acceptance Criteria: Send question; show answer with source chips; AI-waiting and error states; history visible; works from app

Title: Agent deterministic trend-rule tests
Acceptance Criteria: Sparse to tracking focus; low sleep to sleep focus; low exercise to activity focus; low mood to stress focus; rule tests pass

Title: RAG-assisted recommendation generation saved via backend
Acceptance Criteria: Agent retrieves records, analyses trends, generates with Ollama, saves recommendation through backend internal API

Title: Android recommendations screen
Acceptance Criteria: Generate button; trend summary + 3 action items; list newest-first; recommendation visible in app

Title: Full-stack Docker smoke
Acceptance Criteria: mysql + spring + python + ollama reachable; required Ollama models present; all health checks green

Title: CI green (build + test all components)
Acceptance Criteria: GitHub Actions build and test Android/Spring/Python; heavyweight LLM mocked; Actions pass on PR

Title: Repeatable seed data + 15-min demo script
Acceptance Criteria: Idempotent reseed (no duplicate demo user); demo data supports CRUD/chat/agent; rehearsal fits 15 minutes

Title: Author comments + submission zip
Acceptance Criteria: @author comments on classes/key methods; README/setup present; .env.example present and real .env excluded; TeamX.zip built

Title: Full rehearsal + record video
Acceptance Criteria: Clean-machine run of full flow; video recorded under 15 minutes

Title: Peer-evaluation submission
Acceptance Criteria: Each member submits peer evaluation (5 marks)

Title: Proactive recommendations: scheduler + notifications
Acceptance Criteria: Spring @EnableScheduling + @Scheduled agent run; Android local notification via WorkManager polling for new recommendation

Title: Wellness trends dashboard
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard with sleep/exercise/mood summary tiles or simple charts over recent records

Title: Privacy screen + data export/delete
Acceptance Criteria: In-app local-AI privacy statement; delete-account and export-data endpoints wired to UI

Title: Security hardening
Acceptance Criteria: Login throttling/lockout; token-expiry UX; cleartext disabled for non-demo builds

Title: Standout framing in demo
Acceptance Criteria: Demo intro frames local-AI + agentic combo; one-screen how-it-works explainer
